subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The family of His Holiness Nabil is related to His Glorious Holiness, for verily sixty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان خاندان حضرت نبیل منسوب بحضرت جلیل است زیرا فی الحقیقه شصت
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @role and station of women
